Source: WebBreacher/WhatsMyName (https://whatsmyname.app).
Generated by scripts/import_whatsmyname.py. Detections imported unverified — run `adler --doctor --with-wmn` before relying on any signature.
Adler's MIT licence does NOT cover this file. Downstream redistribution must preserve attribution and the ShareAlike obligation on derivative data.
